subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Thy petition, sanctified above all other petitions, hath attained unto the Most Holy Court, and the servant in attendance hath submitted it through thy tongue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی عریضه ات مقدس از عرایض بساحت اقدس فائز و عبد حاضر بلسان تو عرض نمود
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @development of capacity and readiness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
